ab: nanku ’ali’an i sinkay tu ngadan. alrak za pinuyumayan i intaw.
ch: 我的好朋友叫sinkay，他也是卑南族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is sinkay, and he is also an  pinuyumayan child.

ch: 我們一起在利嘉村讀書。
en: We study together in the Likavung tribe.

ab: marayas mi mukasa kingkinger tu vinavatiyan na dawdawan na vativatiyan, sayhu mi temarapinuyumayan mapiya.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說卑南語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the pinuyumayan proficiently.

ab: tihasar zi semever ku, alusu zi varivariw i singkay.
ch: 我很高也很胖，singkay很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while singkay is short and thin.

ab: salaw mivaawan i singkay, zi sahar mi mapiya kantaw.
ch: singkay很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: singkay is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
